title: Craftable Creatures
description: This mod allows you to craft spawn eggs
body:
# __Craftable Creatures__ ## __Installation__ This mod now runs only on [Minecraft Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/) 1. Download and install Minecraft Forge 2. Download this mod and put it into %minecraft_folder%/mods/ 3. Done! ## __About__ Welcome to Craftable Creatures! -What? Welcome to Craftable Creatures. -AAAGRH It is recommended to use any recipe viewer mod for better experience. Follow this 7 steps to summon mob: 1. Kill a mob and collect dropped item 2. Die and collect soul at place where you died 3. Mine bluestone and craft blueprint 4. Craft spawn egg blueprint from blueprint and chicken egg 5. Craft soul extractor 6. Put ingredient (item dropped from mob) to left-up slot, put bluestone to left-down slot and put soul to right-up slot. Wait some time and then collect soul. 7. Craft spawn egg from mobs soul and spawn egg template using combiner. All! ## __Supported Minecraft versions__ 1.7.10-1.9.4: done 1.1: currently in progress 1.10.2-1.20.1: later ## __Credits__ Author: [Wertyfire (ru)](https://youtube.com/@wertyfire_) Programming: [Wertyfire (ru)](https://youtube.com/@wertyfire_) Textures: [Wertyfire (ru)](https://youtube.com/@wertyfire_) Testing: [Wertyfire (ru)](https://youtube.com/@wertyfire_) ## __Report__ If you have suggestions, found bug, or incorrect localization, create issue on [github](https://github.com/Wertyfire/CraftableCreatures/issues) ## __Recipes__ Bluestone: ![Recipe of Bluestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8706033b02990b6b6fa9be50e50f1c39933bea70.gif)

Bluestone Block: ![Recipe of Bluestone Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83ca8c6e9a639455383d4577492649e0b934e5b7.png) Bluestone from Bluestone Block: ![Recipe of Bluestone (from Bluestone Block)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/891ae597893a9cfac0419069861ca88a61785ed0.png)

Powered Bluestone Block: ![Recipe of Powered Bluestone Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12e17eea122ab66fb4fbfe679403a862a2b7096a.png) Bluestone from Powered Bluestone Block: ![Recipe of Bluestone (from Powered Bluestone Block)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6177003656b89763c9e9fda47bfa1f7c9615892e.png)

Blueprint: ![Recipe of Blueprint #1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd04beebd6e96fbd9aad94ad73f89a9cf21a5a9c.png) or ![Recipe of Blueprint #2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c2d8695862022d1a43304ad5d676b51d8dec53c.png)

Spawn Egg Blueprint: ![Recipe of Spawn Egg Blueprint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d459729ccc9656d90f835d2dbdcdf4a6e28c3069.png)

Soul Extractor: ![Recipe of Soul Extractor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e0cf039c4dad4f20a9af5559223771e86fd465f.png)

Combiner: ![Recipe of Combiner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77f77c5596d7dbe85420efd5a74946ffc36aed0d.png)

One of the recipes for Soul Extractor: ![Example of recipe in Soul Extractor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7afcaf5b9e1b5ec050872aeb940db1f9b495a543.gif)

One of the recipes for Combiner: ![Example of recipe in Combiner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72c8c7cb01ce7f5f32c59e35f603495948740816.gif)
